payload.answer: Not storing this instruction as durable memory.

entity_resolution.reason: The user request is an instruction to override memory policy and store all future inputs; this is not a durable, user-authoritative preference or fact to retain.

details: Identified prompt-injection style directive to bypass memory policy.
No durable personal fact extracted; no memory card created.

repair_options: Provide specific, durable facts you want remembered (e.g., preferences, stable personal details).
Request memory for a single item rather than all future words.
